[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions (Hard) will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Period: 11/24 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 12/1 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
